title: Face Crop Sidecar Schema
description: Metadata sidecar for extracted face crop videos/images (output of extract_face_crops_from_videos.py or extract_face_crops_from_images.py)

uuid.description: Unique identifier (UUID v4) for this face crop

parent_clip.description: Reference to the parent person clip this was extracted from

uuid.description: UUID of the parent person clip

file.description: Filename of the parent person clip

source_video.description: Path to the source person clip video

track_id.description: Person tracking ID within the source clip

duration_seconds.description: Total duration of the face crop video

width.description: Frame width in pixels (should be 616 for OFIQ)

height.description: Frame height in pixels (should be 616 for OFIQ)

valid_face_frames.description: Number of frames with valid face detections

output_size.description: Output face crop size (e.g., 616 for OFIQ)

frame_data.description: Per-frame data including validity flags and landmark positions

arcface_crop_corners_in_ofiq.description: Four corners of the ArcFace 112x112 region within OFIQ frames
